flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bob Jones University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 2.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bob Jones University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.9k → $24.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bob Jones University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.9k → $24.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bob Jones University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
